message:
fix: Database is not a constructor error in hive-mind spawn (#893) (#895)

- Fix ESM/CommonJS import for better-sqlite3 using createRequire
- Add loadSqlite() call at start of spawnSwarm() function
- Add loadSqlite() calls to showConsensus, showMetrics, listMemories, searchMemories
- Bump version to 2.7.42

Closes #893

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
